node_data.name: Bean Burrito Bowl — Maple-Kissed Set
node_data.short_description: Bean Burrito Bowl with black beans, rice, corn, lettuce, salsa, and cheddar.
node_data.meal_suggestion: For a lighter option, use reduced-fat cheddar or dairy-free cheese; swap white rice for brown rice to boost fiber; add avocado or extra veggies for healthy fats and micronutrients.
node_data.nutrition_note: Balanced vegetarian bowl with plant protein from black beans and fiber from beans and rice; corn and salsa add micronutrients, while cheddar provides calcium and some saturated fat.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Bean Burrito Bowl is a single-bowl meal composed of grains (rice) and vegetables/beans mixed together. The meal_suggestion explicitly offers lighter and dairy-free options (reduced-fat or dairy-free cheese, swap to brown rice), so it can be made plant-based and light for Mother.
